- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `>= 2026.4.5, < 2026.4.20`
- Patched version: `2026.4.20`

## Impact

A malicious workspace `.env` could set `MINIMAX_API_HOST` and redirect credentialed MiniMax requests to an attacker-controlled origin, exposing the MiniMax API key in the outbound `Authorization` header.

This requires running OpenClaw from an attacker-controlled workspace. Severity is medium.

## Fix

OpenClaw now blocks `MINIMAX_API_HOST` from workspace dotenv injection and removes env-driven URL routing from the affected MiniMax request path.

Fix commit:

- `2f06696579a1ab0cb5bbbbb6a900414a6b2e3cd1`

## Release

Fixed in OpenClaw `2026.4.20`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00119, "percentile": 0.02046}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h2vw-ph2c-jvwf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-25T23:50:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h2vw-ph2c-jvwf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h2vw-ph2c-jvwf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44992"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-25T23:50:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-h2vw-ph2c-jvwf", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/2f06696579a1ab0cb5bbbbb6a900414a6b2e3cd1", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44992", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-minimax-api-host-override-via-workspace-dotenv", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h2vw-ph2c-jvwf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-h2vw-ph2c-jvwf", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Workspace dotenv MiniMax host override could redirect credentialed requests", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T15:56:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h2vw-ph2c-jvwf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2026.4.5, < 2026.4.20"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Workspace dotenv MiniMax host override could redirect credentialed requests
